ingredients: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives (chicken 26%), cereals, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, oils and fats, fruit, seeds. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Protein 8.7%, Fat content 6.7%, Crude fibre 0.39%, Crude ash 2.4%, Moisture 70.5%, Calcium 0.43%, Phosphorus 0.34%, Sodium 0.15%, Potassium 0.24%, Magnesium 0.03%; per kg: Vitamin A 21,844IU, Vitamin D3 259IU. ADDITIVES PER KG: Nutritional additives: 3b103 (Iron) 15.1mg, 3b202 (Iodine) 0.5mg, 3b405 (Copper) 2.5mg, 3b502 (Manganese) 3.3mg, 3b603 (Zinc) 38.9mg.
